title: Koshish Club Past Events
content: Past Events Report on Donation Drive Shanti Niketan on 15th March 2026 Report on Colors of Giving on 23&24th Feburary 2026 Report on Koshish Kit Distribution on 19th Feburary 2026 Report on Celebration of Children’s Day at Sanskriti School, Shimla, on 14th Nov.2025 Report on motivating parents for participating in Koshish Club on 7th Nov.,2025 Report on Internal Felicitation Ceremony 31st Oct 2025 Report on Diwali Drawing Competition on 8th Oct., 2025 Report on Kamal Ka Camp 1st - 24th May 2025 Report on Computer Literacy Classes from 20th March to 5th April 2025. Report on Donation Drive at Shanti Niketan Subathu Solan on 30th March 2025. Report on declamation contest on 18th January 2025. Report on computer literacy classes from 7 to 29 November 2024. Report on counseling sessions at Shogi and Jubeerhatti Schools on 23rd November 2024. Report of craft making best out of waste on 24th September 2024. Report on Orientation and Awareness Session with Women from Marginal Families on 31st August 2024. Report on the Parent-Tutor Meeting - Koshish Club on 24th August 2024. Report of Donation Drive on 15th May 2024 Report on Educational Workshop at GSSS, Domehar on 12th April 2024. Report on colors of giving on 19-20 March 2024. Report on vigilance awareness week 2-3rd November 2023.
